message:
chore: Add git configuration for Rust project and beads integration

.gitignore:
- Rust build artifacts: /target/ directory
- Legacy code: /legacy_codexbar/ (CodexBar spec extraction reference)
- IDE files: .idea/, .vscode/, vim swap files (*.swp, *.swo)
- OS files: .DS_Store (macOS), Thumbs.db (Windows)
- Environment: .env, .env.local (secrets, local overrides)
- Coverage: *.profraw, *.profdata, /coverage/, tarpaulin-report.html
- Benchmarks: /criterion/ output directory
- Beads viewer: .bv/ local config and caches (user-specific)

.gitattributes:
- Configure beads JSONL merge driver for .beads/issues.jsonl
- Uses 'merge=beads' attribute for conflict-free issue database merging
- Requires bd merge driver to be installed (bd config --global merge.install)

This setup ensures clean version control with proper handling of:
- Build artifacts that should never be committed
- User-specific IDE and OS files
- Sensitive environment configuration
- Test coverage and benchmark output
- Beads issue tracking with custom merge strategy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+
+# Use bd merge for beads JSONL files
+.beads/issues.jsonl merge=beads

@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Rust build artifacts
+/target/
+
+# Legacy code (spec extraction only)
+/legacy_codexbar/
+
+# IDE
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# OS
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
+
+# Environment
+.env
+.env.local
+
+# Coverage
+*.profraw
+*.profdata
+/coverage/
+tarpaulin-report.html
+
+# Benchmarks output
+/criterion/
+
+
+# Added by cargo
+
+/target
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
